patterns.component_extraction_pattern: Project uses _components directories alongside page.tsx files to organize child components
patterns.section_wrapper_pattern: SectionWrapper provides consistent card layout with icon and title
patterns.toggle_pattern: Toggle switches implemented with role='switch', aria-checked, and Tailwind transitions
patterns.bilingual_forms: Language tabs (EN/AR) toggle between English and Arabic inputs with dir='rtl' for Arabic
patterns.image_upload_pattern: Image uploads use FormData, mutation hooks, and display preview thumbnails with remove button
patterns.array_management_pattern: Dynamic arrays (features, links, logos) have add/remove/update/move helper functions
patterns.state_management: Parent page holds all state and passes down via props - no context or global state

existing_implementations.description: Landing page CMS is a 2,052-line god component with 96 useState hooks managing 12 sections
sections: hero - Hero banner with title, subtitle, CTA, image, badge (enabled/disabled toggle)
trustedBy - Logos section with image uploads and names
features - Feature grid with icons, titles, descriptions (add/remove/reorder)
stats - 4 stat counters (customers, messages, languages, uptime)
pricing - Pricing cards with yearly toggle and enterprise CTA
testimonials - Testimonial configuration (title, subtitle, max display)
faq - FAQ configuration (title, subtitle, max display, view-all toggle)
footer - Footer with description, copyright, social links, custom CSS, footer links array
seo - SEO meta tags, OG image, Google Analytics, custom head/footer code, favicon
maintenance - Maintenance mode toggle with title and message
shared_components_in_file: SectionHeader - Section title with enable/disable toggle (lines 113-125)

refactoring_strategy.approach: Extract Component Pattern - preserve all functionality while organizing into focused components
refactoring_strategy.state_management_approach: Keep state in parent page, pass down via props (no prop drilling issues since parent already manages everything)
refactoring_strategy.component_organization: Each section becomes a separate component file in _components directory
refactoring_strategy.shared_utilities: Extract types, shared UI components, and style constants to dedicated files
refactoring_strategy.verification: Manual browser testing critical - all 12 sections must work identically to original

code_quality_issues.maintainability: Modifying one section requires scrolling through 1,500+ lines of unrelated code
code_quality_issues.performance: 96 state variables cause unnecessary re-renders across all 12 sections
code_quality_issues.testability: Impossible to test sections in isolation
code_quality_issues.extensibility: Adding new sections requires modifying the monolithic file

target_metrics.re-render_optimization: Each section only re-renders when its own props change
